name: Shenzhen Ellassay Fashion Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Ellassay Fashion Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells branded women's clothing in China and internationally. It offers products under the ELLASSAY, LAUR√É¬àL, IRO PARIS, ED HARDY, and VIVIENNE TAM brand names through its retail outlets. The company has a strategic alliance with The Carlyle Group. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Shenzhen Ellassay Fashion Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Ellassay Investment Management Ltd.
